theme_notes: US enters third consecutive night of strikes on Iran, Trump reinstates Strait of Hormuz blockade with 20% cargo toll; FIFA World Cup semis confirmed with Spain and Argentina; Jannik Sinner defends Wimbledon men's title against Zverev; Bangkok nightclub fire.
settled: Both at zero. Even Trump can't manage this kind of stability right now.
Sinner defended his Wimbledon title today. You're defending nothing. Bliss.
Balanced. Spain's in the World Cup semis and you two are in perfect harmony.
youOwe: Less than the 20% Hormuz toll on a single shipping container. Still awkward.
Forty bucks. Sinner won Wimbledon in straight sets. You can't win a Venmo battle.
Smaller than a World Cup semi ticket. You're still out in the group stage.
The EU found a billion for Gaza. You can't find a hundred for this debt.
Spain beat Belgium 2-1 in the World Cup. Your debt is the own goal.
Trump slapped a 20% toll on Hormuz shipments. Your partner has noted this approach.
The US is blockading the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner is blockading any invitations.
Sinner won in straight sets and didn't even look tired. You look tired of owing this.
The Bangkok nightclub burned down mid-party. Your financial credibility: same.
Three consecutive nights of US airstrikes on Iran. Three unpaid reminders from your partner.
Spain's in the World Cup semis. Your finances didn't make it past the qualifiers.
Iran hit two tankers in the Hormuz today. Your partner found their role model.
The Strait of Hormuz got a 20% toll and a full naval blockade. What's your excuse?
The World Cup's down to four teams. You've got four figures of explaining to do.
Iran launched attacks across Bahrain and Jordan. This debt has similar range.
The US struck six Iranian coastal sites in three nights. This debt has been accruing longer.
Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner announced something worse.
A 20% toll on every ship through Hormuz. Your partner is considering the same on groceries.
theyOwe: Less than a Hormuz toll. Still — principle doesn't care about small numbers.
Sinner won Wimbledon. Your partner won't win the argument that this is paid.
World Cup semi-final energy. This debt is still in the group stage.
The EU sent a billion to Gaza. Your Venmo request sits at $80. Unopened.
Spain beat Belgium on the world stage. Your partner can't beat a Venmo notification.
Trump put a 20% toll on Hormuz shipping. Try a toll on the shared streaming subscriptions.
Iran attacked shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Your patience is also under attack.
Sinner defended his title for two years running. This debt is approaching that streak.
A Bangkok nightclub burned down overnight. Your goodwill: similarly.
The Strait of Hormuz is blockaded. So is any honest answer from them.
The EU mobilized a reconstruction fund for Gaza. Consider this your reconstruction notice.
Spain and Argentina in the semis. You and this money are in separate tournaments.
America wants 20% on every tanker through Hormuz. You want 100% of this back.
Iran struck Bahrain and Jordan. You're running out of diplomatic options too.
Jannik Sinner defended his Wimbledon title. This debt has been here longer than his reign.
Longer-running than the US-Iran conflict. Less likely to resolve cleanly.
America scrapped USMCA. They scrapped fiscal responsibility around the same time.
Trump blockaded the Strait of Hormuz. Your partner blockaded the concept of repayment.
